title: Authoring template + disclaimer set (RUO + institutional biosafety/IRB/IACUC notice)
context: Protocol authors need a schema-aligned YAML/JSON authoring template so they can populate all required fields correctly from the start, reducing rework and linter failures. The template must also embed the mandatory disclaimer set — Research Use Only (RUO) and the 'not a substitute for your institution's biosafety/EHS/IBC/IACUC/IRB requirements' notice — ensuring every protocol carries these guardrails from day one. Depends on schema-001 (field list) and vocab-004 (valid vocabulary values).
objective: Produce a YAML/JSON authoring template pre-populated with all required schema fields (placeholder values + inline comments), the complete mandatory disclaimer set, and a contributor guide explaining each field and how to fill it correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Template covers all required schema-001 fields with placeholder values and inline comments explaining each field.
Mandatory disclaimer set is embedded: RUO disclaimer and 'not a substitute for institutional biosafety/EHS/IBC/IACUC/IRB' notice, with rationale for each.
Template references valid vocabulary values from vocab-004 for hazard/PPE/waste/biosafety fields.
A contributor guide (Markdown) accompanies the template, explaining provenance requirements, safety auto-escalation, and the ethics flags.
Safety reviewer sign-off (or pending annotation) on the disclaimer set; commit DCO signed-off.
output: Committed authoring template (templates/protocol-template.yaml or equivalent) with inline comments and mandatory disclaimers, plus a contributor guide (Markdown); commit DCO signed-off.
